name: Ankur Regular Non Skid Bowl With Color And Print 235ml
description: Enhance your pet’s mealtime with the ANKUR Regular Non-Skid Bowl. Practical, stylish, and durable, it’s the perfect addition to your pet’s dining routine. Key Features: Non-Skid Base: The bowl’s non-skid bottom keeps it firmly in place, preventing spills and skids, even during your pet’s most enthusiastic mealtimes. Charming Colors and Prints: Available in a vibrant color (Yellow & Black)) and playful prints, this bowl adds a touch of personality to your pet’s feeding area while matching your home decor. Durable and Pet-Friendly: Crafted from high-quality, food-safe materials, this bowl is built to withstand daily use and is gentle on your pet’s health. Easy to Clean: The smooth, easy-to-clean surface ensures hassle-free maintenance, whether you rinse it by hand or pop it in the dishwasher. Generous Capacity: With 235ml of space, this bowl is ideal for larger breeds or multiple pets, making it versatile for both food and water.
